steps.title: Use the colon definition
steps.content: The colon explains the blank by saying the delta is a constantly evolving network that changes in size and shape as sediment is deposited. The word must mean changing or active.

steps.title: Reject static or unrelated meanings
steps.content: B means unchanging, C means unmatched by rivals, and D means able to continue over time. The needed word must match a delta that is constantly evolving. The answer is A.
